series_metadata.series_description: Records contain the permanent history of banks including updated information of amended articles and related changes, a history of those banks with trust powers, renewal fees, date of payment and a microfiche copy of the trust record book.

retention_rules.disposition: Microform: Retain microfilm copy in the operating area at all times ; Paper: Retain hard copy in operating area for one year, then microfilm. After microfilm has been checked for quality and completeness, then transfer hard copy records to State Archives at the Ohio Historical Society, Microform: Permanent ; Paper: Archives
